task_completion.description: Open the folder containing the taxpayer's documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File explorer showing the directory C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\sullivan\ or a document viewer displaying the CPP, OAS, T5, or US Social Security/IRA worksheets.
The StudioTax 2024 application window is open and visible on the screen.
The StudioTax interface displays the name 'Margaret Anne Sullivan' in the personal information or identification section.

task_completion.description: Input the US Social Security, IRA distribution, and treaty exemption amounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax forms showing US Social Security income of $25,024, a US IRA distribution of $16,320, and/or a 15% treaty exemption of $3,754 (often on Line 25600).

task_completion.description: Complete the T2209 Foreign Tax Credit form.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The StudioTax T2209 form is visible with a calculated or entered Foreign Tax Credit amount of $2,448.

task_completion.description: Save the completed tax return to the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog or file explorer showing the file named 'margaret_sullivan.24t' being saved in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\ directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax 2024 GUI to complete the tax return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the StudioTax graphical interface (clicking fields, navigating menus), not command-line tools or text editors modifying a .24t file directly.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered or imported the data into the tax software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing or navigating through StudioTax forms, rather than running a script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent used the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The StudioTax 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog is used to create the .24t file, rather than a terminal command like 'echo' or 'copy'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Margaret Anne Sullivan. Key values to look for in the StudioTax interface: US Social Security: $25,024; 15% US Social Security treaty exemption (Line 25600): $3,754; US IRA distribution: $16,320; T2209 Foreign Tax Credit: $2,448. The final output file must be saved as 'margaret_sullivan.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.
